message:
chore: add gitignore patterns for agent-generated ephemeral files

Add patterns to prevent accidentally tracking files created by
concurrent coding agent workflows:

- Agent tool MCP config backups (.cline.mcp.json.*, .codex.mcp.json.*,
  .cursor.mcp.json.*, .gemini.mcp.json.*, .opencode.json.*,
  .windsurf.mcp.json.*, .claude/*.bak)
- Agent mail SQLite runtime databases (storage.sqlite3*)
- Per-agent build directories (target_*/) and Cargo caches (.cargo-*/,
  .cargo_*/) used for isolated concurrent builds
- Ephemeral test binaries (run_test, tiny_test) generated during
  validation passes
- Build/test artifacts directory (artifacts/)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,3 +71,31 @@ beads_*.db
 # Compiled binaries
 a.out
 .claude/settings.local.json
+
+# Agent tool MCP config backups (timestamped .bak files from asupersync/tool sync)
+.claude/*.bak
+.cline.mcp.json.*
+.codex.mcp.json.*
+.cursor.mcp.json.*
+.gemini.mcp.json.*
+.opencode.json.*
+.windsurf.mcp.json.*
+
+# Agent mail SQLite databases (runtime state)
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+storage.sqlite3.bak
+
+# Per-agent build directories (concurrent agent builds)
+target_*/
+
+# Per-agent Cargo caches (concurrent agent builds use isolated registries)
+.cargo-*/
+.cargo_*/
+
+# Ephemeral test binaries (generated by agents during validation)
+run_test
+tiny_test
+
+# Build/test artifacts directory
+artifacts/
